name: libra-ui-e2e-tests
description: E2E tests for Libra UI Flutter app

scripts.test:android: npm run build:android && dotenv wdio run ./wdio.conf.js
scripts.test:ios: echo "iOS tests not yet configured. You'll need to build the app and add a capability in wdio.conf.js"
scripts.android.login: npm run build:android && dotenv wdio run ./wdio.conf.js --spec ./specs/login.e2e.ts
